texto: I've had tons of bullies who would call me retarded, even on my Facebook page. It's sad and it really hurts. I want to tell people not to use the word. Don't say your friend's retarded when they do something foolish. If you have a disability, keep working hard. Whatever it takes, do it, and don't be mean to people.
explicacao: Citação de Lauren Potter sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I've had tons of bullies who would call me retarded, even on my Facebook page. It's sad and it re…” articula amizade, working-hard, disability em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.

frase_original: I've had tons of bullies who would call me retarded, even on my Facebook page. It's sad and it really hurts. I want to tell people not to use the word. Don't say your friend's retarded when they do something foolish. If you have a disability, keep working hard. Whatever it takes, do it, and don't be mean to people.
